notes: v1.14.137 - Photoreal icon rollout STAGE B1 (mode/nav icons). Swapped the 3 bottom-nav glyphs (Command/Work/Ref in #rd-botnav) from the #ph-command/work/ref sprite SVGs to branded WebP: -> . Redesign-only surface (#rd-botnav renders only under body.rd; legacy never renders it) so ?legacy=1 is byte-identical. Added the 3 phantom-mode-*-256.webp to /icons/ and to the sw.js precache array FIRST (precache-first). New global CSS utilities: .ico-photoreal{display:block;object-fit:contain} (per-surface size rule) + .icon-glow{drop-shadow cyan/violet bloom, John-approved} - both unreferenced by legacy markup so byte-safe; nav-scoped size rule #rd-botnav .botitem img.ico-photoreal{26px}. Active-tab state still shown by the .botitem.active chrome (cyan border+bg); the art carries its own color. The #ph-command/work/ref sprite symbol defs are left in place (retired in a later sweep). Three-stamp lockstep 136->137 (CACHE_VERSION busts SW for the new precache). Gates: node --check x3 inline + sw.js, CSS brace balance, version.json valid JSON, ?legacy=1 byte-identical, tap target = the .botitem (unchanged). Render-verified at iPhone viewport: the 3 mode icons paint + glow in the nav. DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved, cold-aisle): close+reopen, confirm v1.14.137, the bottom nav Command/Work/Ref show the photoreal mode icons with the cyan/violet glow, active tab still reads lit (cyan chrome), tapping each still switches mode; Airplane Mode + reload = nav icons still paint (precache proof); ?legacy=1 = 5-tab legacy nav unchanged. NEXT: Tier-1 remainder (B6a sop/bom/manifest + B2a assistant). PRIOR v1.14.136 = rollout Stage A (10 card icons -> final true-256 photoreal art, bytes only).
